objective: Confirm a screened candidate's activity against the kinase target with a governed, human-executed wet-lab assay (Regime C). Promotion requires an ingested, signed assay result bound to a live human approval — never an in-silico score.

external.proposal: Run a wet-lab binding/potency assay on the screened candidate molecule against the kinase target.
external.measurement: measured_potency (pIC50) from a wet-lab dose-response assay
external.cost_note: reagents + instrument time + analyst hours for a dose-response assay
